resources.string: Tap the switch to reduce ducking while YouTube or Spotify keeps playing (Mixer mode).
Protection is running. Mixer keeps your stream playing; try Owner only if you still hear ducking.
Mixer (recommended) — silent stream only; YouTube and Spotify keep playing
Owner — stronger anti-duck; may pause or stop other music/video apps
Some phones kill background audio services. Tap to exempt NoDuckingWay from battery optimization.
